notes: Naval capstone Unique base — one instance on the map, found along the map's ocean edge. Shipyard builds everything Port can plus advanced ships up to Aircraft Carrier; Port is also independently listed here (any water-adjacent base can build it), giving Kraken Point both. Both Shipyard and Harbour/Port require an adjacent Water tile, which this base's site is expected to satisfy given its ocean-edge placement. Water Turret is its specialty defense (shared with Rivergate) — an ocean-edge site trivially satisfies its Water-adjacency placement requirement, so it slots in as this base's coastal defense without needing a bespoke building; see data/buildings/water_turret.json. initialGarrison omits Tank Carrier (damage 0, empty canTarget — pure cargo, not a combatant, same reasoning as excluding Engineer/Glider elsewhere) and Aircraft Carrier (deliberately not pre-seeded — a top-tier unit, not a starting-garrison piece). +50% Harbour bonus is a building-scoped resourceModifiers entry (multiplier 1.5) authored directly on this BaseDef, not a Shipyard aura — data/buildings/shipyard.json itself has no auras field.
